mapper.select: select b.board_id,b.title,b.created_at,b.view_count, m.nickname from board b inner join member m on b.member_id = m.member_id where is_deleted = 0 order by b.board_id desc
select b.board_id, b.title, b.content, b.created_at, m.nickname from board b inner join member m on b.member_id = m.member_id where b.board_id = #{board_id}

select b.board_id,b.title,b.created_at,b.view_count, m.nickname from board b inner join member m on b.member_id = m.member_id where is_deleted = 0 and b.member_id = #{member_id} order by b.board_id desc
select r.res_id,r.check_in,r.check_out,r.status,r.created_at, m.nickname from reservation r inner join member m on r.member_id = m.member_id where r.member_id = #{member_id} order by r.res_id desc
